course_title: ABORTION IN WISCONSIN AND BEYOND: EXPLORING MEDICAL, PUBLIC HEALTH, AND SOCIAL SCIENCE PERSPECTIVES
description: Contemporary issues surrounding abortion in the United States with an emphasis on the state of Wisconsin. Abortion-related terminology and clinical practice. Legal and structural barriers that shape inequities in access to abortion care. The relationships between access to abortion care and health and wellbeing, using multidisciplinary approaches. The evolution of pro-choice and reproductive justice movements in the United States and Wisconsin.
